preparing.title: AI Virtual Church
preparing.creatingService: Na biakna ka bawl laitak uh hi…
preparing.hint: Hu la in. Na biakna a sawtlo in kipan ding hi.

offering.title: Piakna
offering.sub: Na lungsim bang in pia in. Piakna khempeuh kisam ngawl hi.
offering.thanksDone: Lungdam. Na piakna a kiman nadingin PayPal tab hong ki-honsak khin hi. 🙏
offering.thanksSkipped: Bangmah hi ngawl — bang hun ah zong na pia thei hi. 🙏

testimony.title: Tetti
testimony.beFirst: Pasian in a sep te a masapen in hong gen in.
testimony.placeholder: Kammal khat nih in, tuni bang ading lungdam ni hiam?
testimony.thanks: Hong genkhia nakaw lungdam. Kiensat zawh ciangin na tetti kilang ding hi. 🙏
testimony.errMore: Tawmkhat hong gen behlap in (a tawmpen kammal 10).
testimony.errSend: Tu in khak thei ngawl. Kik sawm in.

player.worshipHint: Lasa in na lungtang khamuan sak hen. A bei ciangin ka zomzom ding uh hi.
player.beforeYouGoHint: Pasian in a sep te hong gen in a, na lungsim bang in pia in.
player.musicUnavailable: Biakna lasa tu in om ngawl hi. Laisiangtho leh thungetna tawh ka zomzom ding uh hi.
player.tapToStartAudio: Aw kipat nadingin bar tung ah ▶ nen in.
player.tapToStartMusic: Biakna lasa kipat nadingin bar tung ah ▶ nen in.
player.errNetwork: Aw la ding ah network khial.
player.errSource: Aw kipatna munah om ngawl hi.
player.errMusicNetwork: Lasa la ding ah network khial.
player.errMusicSource: Lasa kipatna om ngawl — lasa hun bei khin hi.

songs.title: Biakna La
songs.subtitle: Biakna la kammal te

songs.footer: Zomi biakna la leh labu la te
songs.loadError: La te la thei ngawl hi.

vocabulary.title: Kammal
vocabulary.subtitle: Chin/Zo ↔ Burmese ↔ Hebrew ↔ English kammal — kammal leh kampau {count}. Tunga na pau teel in; Zolai (Tedim) sia a kibulpi hi.
vocabulary.loadError: Kammal list la thei ngawl hi.

intake.sub: Nangma adingin Pasian biakna hun ka bawlsak ding uh hi.
intake.subBack: Na hong pai kik ka kipak mahmah uh hi. Nangma adingin biakna hun ka bawlsak ding uh hi.
intake.namePh: Na gen nop kei leh khualpa min kong pia ding uh hi
intake.emailReq: (kisam hi — theihsakna kong khak ding uh hi)
intake.emailPhLater: Theihsakna na muh nadingin na email gelh in
intake.emailPhNow: Nang hong kipahpih kik thei nadingin
intake.moodLabel: Tuni in na lungsim bangci hiam?
intake.customMoodLabel: A hih kei leh na lungsim thuakna kammal khat tawh gen in (na deih leh)
intake.prayerPh: Na lungsim sunga om thute hong gen in…
intake.whenLabel: Bang hun in na biakna na deih hiam?
intake.preparing: Na biakna ka bawl laitak uh hi…
intake.customize: Thungetna gelh ding ahih kei leh hun khen ding
intake.noAccount: Account kigelhsak theih nai hi · minute khat bek laitak
